name: Christmas Fruit Cookies---whnp81a
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the shortening and brown sugar until smooth.
2. Beat in the eggs one at a time, then stir in the vanilla extract.
3. Dissolve the baking soda in the buttermilk.
4. Gradually combine the flour and spices with the creamed mixture, alternating with the buttermilk and bourbon. Mix well after each addition.
5. Sprinkle half of the flour over the fruit pieces.
6. Stir the fruit and pecans into the batter.
7. Drop spoonfuls of dough onto greased baking sheets.
8. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 10-15 minutes, or until golden brown.
9. Makes approximately 6 dozen cookies.
